subcodes.title: Words spoken at railway station in Buffalo, 1912-09-12
subcodes.first_line: A man may give $1,000 without minding it but he should not yield even a dollar to the person who wishes to take it wrongfully, for such wrongful behavior flouts justice and disrupts the order of the world.
subcodes.first_line_orig: انسان هزار دولار میبخشد نقلی نیست اما یک دولار تعسدی کسی را قبول نمیکند زیرا اینگونه تعدی منافی عدل و نظم عالم است
subcodes.subjects: @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @order; organization; tact; deliberation [tadbir]
